Poker Hand #HD5555555551: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:34:00
Table 'Rush&Cash3' 6-Max Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain2 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain3 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Hero ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 5: Villain4 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($10.00 in chips)
Villain3: posts small blind $0.05
Hero: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Qs Jh]
Villain4: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain5: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain1: folds
Villain2: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain3: folds
Hero: calls $0.20
*** FLOP *** [Qh 5c 2d]
Hero: checks
Villain2: bets $0.25
Hero: calls $0.25
*** TURN *** [Qh 5c 2d] [Jd]
Hero: checks
Villain2: bets $0.55
Hero: raises $1.65 to $2.20
Villain2: folds
Hero collected $2.70 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $2.80 | Rake $0.10
Board [Qh 5c 2d Jd]
Seat 2: Villain2 (button) folded on the Turn
Seat 4: Hero (big blind) collected ($2.70)
